title: Device Home screen - Software version
scenario: Software version displayed on Device Home screen follows correct format for Morpheus (X.Y) and Neo/Chronos (setid) devices in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Locate the connected device card or tile for the paired Poly Bluetooth device.
4. Observe the software/firmware version displayed on the Device Home screen.
5. If the device is a Morpheus device (e.g., Voyager Focus UC), verify the version is displayed in X.Y format, where X is the firmware version and Y is the language version.
6. If the device is a Neo or Chronos device (e.g., Voyager 5200 Series), verify the version is displayed in setid format (e.g., 0.0.285.1601).
expected: The software version is displayed correctly on the Device Home screen according to the device type: Morpheus devices show version in X.Y format (firmware.language), and Neo/Chronos devices show version in setid format (e.g., 0.0.285.1601).
